narrative:
Precinct Wellington Vill North (precinct in Lorain County) has 1,355 registered voters, with 61.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.1%, a modest Republican lean of 4.4 percentage points.
